description: Forest route between Tsocowis and Darling has not been brushed yet this season.  Trail is visible but crowded by foliage.
Multiple missing ladder rungs in this section, 4 on one ladder making it very difficult to pass. Use caution especially going down!!
Was able to cross Klanawa river without the cable car at the mouth of the river at low tide.
Small black bear foraging in the intertidal zone between Darling and Michigan. We gave him lots of space and he watched us pass by before resuming foraging on the beach.
The trail was mostly dry, offering summer-like conditions. However, there were some mud bogs between the 65 km and 64 km marks.
